# ollim-bot Documentation

> ADHD-friendly Discord bot with proactive reminders, powered by Claude.

## Getting Started
- [ollim-bot overview](getting-started/overview.mdx): ADHD-friendly Discord bot with proactive reminders, powered by Claude.
- [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart.mdx): Get ollim-bot running in under 5 minutes.
- [Setup guide](getting-started/setup.mdx): Set up ollim-bot from scratch with Discord, Google OAuth, and environment configuration.
- [How ollim-bot works](getting-started/how-it-works.mdx): Understand the agent loop, session persistence, fork model, and context flow.
- [Design philosophy](getting-started/design-philosophy.mdx): Why ollim-bot is built the way it is.

## Using the Bot
- [Conversations](core-usage/conversations.mdx): Learn how DM conversations, message flow, and context management work.
- [Slash commands](core-usage/slash-commands.mdx): All Discord slash commands available in ollim-bot.
- [Forks](core-usage/forks.mdx): Branch conversations into isolated contexts with interactive and background forks.
- [Embeds & buttons](core-usage/embeds-and-buttons.mdx): Understand how the agent sends Discord embeds with interactive buttons and inquiry actions.
- [Permissions](core-usage/permissions.mdx): Control which tools the agent can use with permission modes and approval workflows.

## Scheduling
- [Scheduling overview](scheduling/overview.mdx): Proactive scheduling with routines and reminders.
- [Routines](scheduling/routines.mdx): Create recurring cron-scheduled prompts that define the bot's daily rhythm.
- [Reminders](scheduling/reminders.mdx): Schedule one-shot time-based prompts with optional follow-up chains.
- [Background forks](scheduling/background-forks.mdx): Configure disposable agent sessions for scheduled tasks with model overrides and tool restrictions.
- [Ping budget](scheduling/ping-budget.mdx): Control how often background forks can notify you with a refill-on-read token bucket.
- [Real-world examples](scheduling/examples.mdx): Annotated scheduling examples from an actual data directory.

## Integrations
- [Google integration](integrations/google-overview.mdx): Connect Google Tasks, Calendar, and Gmail through a shared OAuth flow.
- [Google Tasks](integrations/google-tasks.mdx): Manage Google Tasks through CLI commands and agent-powered embed buttons.
- [Google Calendar](integrations/google-calendar.mdx): Manage Google Calendar events through CLI commands and agent-powered embeds.
- [Gmail](integrations/google-gmail.mdx): Read-only email access via the gmail-reader subagent.
- [Webhooks](integrations/webhooks.mdx): Trigger background forks from external services via authenticated HTTP endpoints.

## Extending
- [Extend ollim-bot](extending/overview.mdx): When to use routines, reminders, webhooks, MCP tools, or subagents.
- [MCP tools](extending/mcp-tools.mdx): Reference all seven MCP tools the agent uses for embeds, pings, forks, and chains.
- [Subagents](extending/subagents.mdx): Understand how specialized subagents handle email triage, history review, and engagement analysis.
- [System prompt](extending/system-prompt.mdx): How the system prompt is structured and what gets injected.
- [Adding new integrations](extending/adding-integrations.mdx): How to add Google services, MCP tools, CLI commands, and webhook specs.

## Self-Hosting
- [Self-hosting guide](self-hosting/guide.mdx): Fork the repo, configure your instance, and deploy ollim-bot as a personal assistant.
- [Discord bot setup](self-hosting/discord-bot-setup.mdx): Create a Discord application, bot token, and enable required intents.
- [Google OAuth setup](self-hosting/google-oauth-setup.mdx): Set up Google Cloud OAuth credentials and complete the first authentication flow.

## Configuration
- [Configuration reference](configuration/reference.mdx): Configure ollim-bot with environment variables and understand the data directory.
- [Data directory](configuration/data-directory.mdx): Explore the ~/.ollim-bot/ directory structure and understand each data file.
- [File formats](configuration/file-formats.mdx): Reference the YAML frontmatter fields and JSONL schemas used by all data files.

## Architecture
- [Architecture overview](architecture/overview.mdx): Explore the module map, key architectural patterns, and data flow through the system.
- [Session management](architecture/session-management.mdx): Learn how sessions persist across restarts, compact when context grows, and recover from /clear.
- [Context flow](architecture/context-flow.mdx): How context flows between main session, forks, background forks, and pending updates.
- [Streaming & Discord](architecture/streaming.mdx): How agent responses stream to Discord with throttled edits and overflow handling.

## Development
- [Development guide](development/guide.mdx): Set up a development environment, understand the project structure, and follow code conventions.
- [Testing](development/testing.mdx): Run the test suite and understand the real-data, no-gratuitous-mocks testing approach.
- [CLI reference](development/cli-reference.mdx): Look up all CLI subcommands and flags for managing the bot, routines, reminders, and Google services.
- [Troubleshooting](development/troubleshooting.mdx): Diagnose common issues with startup, sessions, scheduling, and Google OAuth.

## Changelog
- [Changelog](changelog.mdx): Version history and updates.
